plugins.name: saywhen
plugins.description: Voice notifications for Claude Code - announces when tasks complete, need input, or are blocked

plugins.name: og-image-drafting
plugins.description: Brainstorm illustration ideas for a blog post and generate side-by-side variants (concepts × art styles) via the OpenAI image API, with an HTML preview gallery.

plugins.name: clapboard
plugins.description: Sync, trim, and master multi-track interview audio/video without an NLE — cross-correlation sync + mlx-whisper transcription + ffmpeg edits (cuts, mutes, ducks, fades, polish)
